title: クレーンゲーム大成功！

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Boy howdy—you struck gold! And ya looked so
cool runnin' the controls!
choice_data_list: It was a piece of cake!
It was a piece of cake!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Oh, really? You mean there's cake in there too?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Well, since you're such a pro at this, next time be
sure to grab some cake too!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
You made today really special, so thank ya! I
won't ever forget it!
